leadText: Steel Roller (Japanese: アイアンローラー Iron Roller) is a damage-dealing Steel-type move introduced during Generation VIII, in The Isle of Armor. In Generation IX, it is the signature move of Iron Treads.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Steel Roller deals damage and removes any active terrain . If no terrain is active upon the move's execution, it will fail. Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl [ edit | edit source ] Steel Roller cannot be selected in a battle.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh LA The user attacks while destroying the terrain. This move fails when the ground hasn't turned into a terrain. BD SP This move can't be used. It's recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can't be remembered. S V The user attacks while destroying the terrain. This move fails if the ground hasn't turned into a terrain.
